nasb.text: Elijah said to him, “Elisha, please stay here, for the Lord has sent me to Jericho.” But he said, “As the Lord lives, and as you yourself live, I will not leave you.” So they came to Jericho.

esv.text: Elijah said to him, “Elisha, please stay here, for the Lord has sent me to Jericho.” But he said, “As the Lord lives, and as you yourself live, I will not leave you.” So they came to Jericho.

cnv.text: 以利亞對以利沙說：“你留在這裡吧，因為耶和華差派我往耶利哥。”他說：“我指著永活的耶和華和你的性命起誓：我必不離開你。”於是他們來到耶利哥。

ccb.text: 以利亚对以利沙说：“你留在这里吧，耶和华差遣我去耶利哥。”以利沙说：“我凭永活的耶和华和你的性命起誓，我决不离开你。”于是二人前往耶利哥。
